# Vendor reference docs

TI-published reference material for the SoC and dev board this repo targets.
Kept here so the build environment, ADRs, and runbooks can link to a known-good
revision instead of "search ti.com."

When a doc is superseded, replace it in-place and bump the revision suffix in
the filename so older commits still resolve to the document that was current
at the time.

## Index

| File | Doc # | Subject | Rev. date |
|------|-------|---------|-----------|
| [AM62x-Low-Power-SK-EVM-Users-Guide-SPRUJ51A.pdf](AM62x-Low-Power-SK-EVM-Users-Guide-SPRUJ51A.pdf) | SPRUJ51A | AM62x Low-Power SK EVM User's Guide (Rev. A) — board overview, power tree, boot mode switches, connector pinouts for the SK-AM62-LP dev board | 2025-11-24 |
